title: euphrasia minima subsp. drosocalyx
intro: Euphrasia minima subsp. drosocalyx is a subspecies of the Euphrasia minima plant, commonly known as a small, annual or biennial herbaceous plant found in alpine environments. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to treat eye issues such as conjunctivitis and cataracts due to its high concentration of iridoid glycosides. The health benefits of Euphrasia minima subsp. drosocalyx include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it a potential treatment for infections and allergic reactions. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in the form of tinctures, teas, and eye drops, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness in modern medicine.
